# RejectCheck

> RejectCheck is an AI-powered CV and job application diagnosis tool. Candidates upload their CV and a job description and get a full breakdown - ATS simulation, technical skill gap radar, GitHub and LinkedIn audit, red-flag detection, and a plan to close the gaps. The analysis runs a multi-pass Claude pipeline (Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 streams the scored diagnosis, then a second deep pass generates per-issue fixes, project recommendations, and ATS keywords; a Claude Haiku 4.5 pass cross-checks the CV against LinkedIn/GitHub). Official site: https://rejectcheck.com

## What it does

- **ATS simulation** - Runs your CV through an Applicant Tracking System filter tuned to the exact job description. Surfaces missing keywords with point values so you know exactly what to add to pass the recruiter's automated filter.
- **Technical skill gap radar** - Maps your technical stack against the job's requirements on a radar chart. Instantly shows what you have, what you're missing, and by how much.
- **GitHub signal audit** - Analyzes commit history, repo quality, language usage, and project relevance against the target role. Detects gaps between what your CV claims and what your code shows.
- **LinkedIn signal audit** - Cross-references your LinkedIn profile (recommendations, title clarity, summary consistency) with your CV to catch inconsistencies recruiters will flag.
- **Red flag detection** - Identifies employment gaps, vague titles, passive tone, and seniority mismatches that typically trigger auto-rejection.
- **CV rewrite (premium)** - One-click surgical rewrite: missing keywords injected, passive tone converted, seniority signals added. Exports as PDF.
- **Cover letter generator (premium)** - Generates a tailored cover letter from your CV and the target job description.
- **Negotiation playbook (HIRED tier)** - Market salary positioning chart with the candidate's likely range, leverage points cited from CV/JD evidence, a ready-to-send counter-offer email anchored to a defensible figure, anchoring strategy, interview talking points, and a salary impact estimate per roadmap action. Anti-hallucination guardrails: salary disclosed by the JD is extracted only when explicit (no euphemism inference); the broader market range is always labelled as a general estimate, never as a company-specific offer.

## Who it's for

- Software engineers and technical candidates applying to companies that use ATS systems (which is the majority of medium-to-large employers).
- Career switchers who want a brutally honest diagnosis of why their application is getting filtered before a human reads it.
- Non-technical candidates who need to pass ATS keyword screening and get structural feedback on their CV.

The tool is bilingual (English + French) and targets candidates worldwide, with a focus on EU and North American job markets.

## How to use

1. Visit https://rejectcheck.com/en/analyze (or /fr/analyze for French).
2. Upload your CV as a PDF.
3. Paste the target job description (link or raw text).
4. Optionally add your GitHub username and LinkedIn PDF export for deeper signal analysis.
5. The scored diagnosis streams in first (typically around a minute); the deep pass — per-issue fixes, project recommendation, and ATS keywords — is then generated and delivered right after.

No signup is required for the first analysis (IP-tracked). Registered users get 3 free analyses per month with results saved to their dashboard. Paid plans add more monthly analyses, CV rewrite, cover letter generation, and (on Hired) the negotiation playbook.

## Pricing

See the machine-readable pricing file: https://rejectcheck.com/pricing.md

- **Free (REJECTED plan)** - 1 analysis with no account (then 3 per month once registered). ATS simulation, score breakdown, skill gap radar, red flags, CV tone and seniority audit.
- **Shortlisted** - €19.99/month. 15 full analyses per month, analysis history, CV rewrite, saved CVs.
- **Hired** - €39.99/month. Everything in Shortlisted plus 30 analyses per month, cover letter generator, and the negotiation playbook (counter-offer email, leverage points, salary positioning, per-action impact estimates). Refund guarantee: refund of the current month if you get hired.
- **Credit packs** - One-time top-ups (permanent credits) for extra analyses beyond the monthly plan allowance.

## Key pages

- Home (EN): https://rejectcheck.com/en
- Home (FR): https://rejectcheck.com/fr
- CV Analyzer: https://rejectcheck.com/en/analyze
- ATS Checker (free, for developers): https://rejectcheck.com/en/ats-checker
- Resume Checker (AI, beyond ATS): https://rejectcheck.com/en/resume-checker
- Software Engineer CV Guide: https://rejectcheck.com/en/software-engineer-cv — full structural guide for engineer CVs (5 sections, senior vs junior signaling, FAQ).
- Deep CV Review: https://rejectcheck.com/en/cv-review — written critique with before/after rewrites, anchored to a specific role. Distinct from the score-based resume checker.
- Pricing: https://rejectcheck.com/en/pricing
- Privacy policy: https://rejectcheck.com/en/privacy

## Guides (long-form, citation-friendly)

- How to Pass ATS in 2026 — A Developer's Guide: https://rejectcheck.com/en/guides/how-to-pass-ats — step-by-step on ATS parsing, format traps, exact-keyword matching, and verification.
- Why Developers Get Rejected (And Never Find Out Why): https://rejectcheck.com/en/guides/why-developers-get-rejected — the three filters between "Submit" and an interview (ATS, 6-second HR scan, hiring manager review), 9 red flags, junior-vs-senior signals, 3-step iteration framework.
- Software Engineer Resume Tips — 12 Rules: https://rejectcheck.com/en/guides/software-engineer-resume-tips — actionable tips ranked by impact, with before/after bullet rewrites for hiring manager review.

## What makes RejectCheck different

- **No ATS-score myth** - Most tools sell a magic "ATS pass-rate". In reality most ATS don't auto-reject you on a keyword score — a human recruiter decides. RejectCheck checks the machine-readable layer AND tells you why a human would set your CV aside, anchored on the specific job.
- **Verdict anchored on a real job description** - Instead of a generic resume score, RejectCheck judges your rejection risk against the specific JD you paste, so the feedback is about that role, not resumes in general.
- **Multi-pass analysis, not a single prompt** - A streamed scored diagnosis, a deep pass for grounded per-issue fixes, and a Haiku digest that cross-checks CV vs LinkedIn vs GitHub for inconsistencies — more coverage than a one-shot rewrite.
- **Radar chart for skill gaps** - Instead of a list of "missing skills", RejectCheck visualizes the delta between your profile and the job on a radar chart, so you see the shape of the gap at a glance.
- **GitHub audit against the job description** - Unique in the category. Commit history, language distribution, and repo quality scored against the specific role you're applying to.
- **Close the gap, not just reword it** - Beyond the diagnosis, RejectCheck recommends a concrete portfolio project (with a generated starter repo) to build the skills you're actually missing.

## Tech stack

Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router, React 19, TypeScript). Backend: NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL (via Supabase). AI: Anthropic Claude (Sonnet 4.6 for diagnosis and fixes, Haiku 4.5 for the cross-profile digest); the generated starter repo uses Google Gemini. Payments: Stripe (web) and RevenueCat (mobile). Hosting: Vercel (web) and Railway (API).

## Languages

Available in English and French. Each page has hreflang alternates. French version of this file: https://rejectcheck.com/llms-fr.txt

## Contact

- Support: support@rejectcheck.com
- Website: https://rejectcheck.com
